description: 微信公众号图文发布流程（v1.7.18：改回从正文选封面方案——正文已有图片，从正文选取更可靠，避免本地下载/上传的复杂性）

steps.descript: 导航到微信公众号主页
点击登录按钮
等待登录完成
进入内容管理
点击草稿箱
点击新的创作

steps.value: const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a')); const writeLink = links.find(a => (a.innerText||'').trim() === '写新文章'); if (writeLink) { writeLink.target = '_self'; writeLink.removeAttribute('target'); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, found: true, href: writeLink.href }); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到 写新文章 链接（可能需要 hover 才显示）', linkCount: links.length, linkTexts: links.map(a => (a.innerText||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) });
steps.descript: 移除 写新文章 链接的 target=_blank（改为当前页跳转，避免新标签页导致 ctx.page 失效）
点击 写新文章（target 已改为 _self，在当前标签页打开编辑页）
等待跳转到编辑页（URL 含 appmsg_edit_v2）
等待编辑页加载（ProseMirror 初始化）

steps.value: const SELS = ['.weui-desktop-dialog', '.weui-desktop-modal', '[role="dialog"]', '.js_dialog', '.js_modal', '.weui-desktop-dialog__wrp', '.weui-desktop-modal__wrp', '[class*="modal"]', '[class*="dialog"]', '[class*="popup"]', '[class*="mask"]', '.tips_box', '.guide-popup', '.new-feature']; const BTNS_TEXT = ['我知道了', '知道了', '确定', '确认', '同意', '关闭', '取消', '暂不', '下次再说', '不再提示', '不再显示', '×', 'x', '关闭']; const BTNS_CLS = ['close', 'cancel', 'dismiss', 'js_close']; const dialogs = new Set(); for (const s of SELS) { document.querySelectorAll(s).forEach(d => dialogs.add(d)); } let closed = []; const allDialogInfo = []; for (const d of dialogs) { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width <= 0 || r.height <= 0) continue; const cls = (d.className || '').slice(0, 80); const txt = (d.innerText || '').slice(0, 150).replace(/\s+/g, ' '); allDialogInfo.push({ cls, text: txt }); const btns = d.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .weui-desktop-btn, .js_close, .close, .weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"]'); let btnClicked = false; for (const b of btns) { const t = (b.innerText || b.textContent || '').trim(); const c = (b.className || '').toLowerCase(); const isClose = BTNS_TEXT.some(k => t.includes(k)) || BTNS_CLS.some(k => c.includes(k)) || t === '×' || t === 'x'; if (isClose) { try { b.click(); closed.push(t || c.slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } if (!btnClicked) { const closeIcons = d.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"], [class*="close-btn"], [aria-label*="close"], [aria-label*="关闭"]'); for (const ic of closeIcons) { try { ic.click(); closed.push('icon:' + (ic.className || '').slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } } return JSON.stringify({ dialogCount: allDialogInfo.length, dialogs: allDialogInfo, closedCount: closed.length, closed });
steps.descript: 关闭公告/引导/协议弹窗（覆盖 weui-desktop-dialog/modal/popup/mask 等，点击 我知道了/确定/关闭/×/取消）
等待弹窗关闭动画

steps.value: const pm = document.querySelectorAll('.ProseMirror'); const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const titleInput = document.querySelector('#title, input.js_title, textarea.js_title'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace, .edui-body-container, .ql-editor'); const layout = document.querySelector('.weui-desktop-layout__main'); const editor = document.querySelector('.appmsg_editor'); const info = { url: location.href, viewport: { w: window.innerWidth, h: window.innerHeight }, pmCount: pm.length, pmClasses: Array.from(pm).map(e => (e.className||'').slice(0,80)), titlePm: titlePm ? { rect: titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: titlePm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, bodyPm: bodyPm ? { rect: bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: bodyPm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, titleInput: titleInput ? { tag: titleInput.tagName, id: titleInput.id, cls: (titleInput.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, ueditor: ueditor ? { tag: ueditor.tagName, id: ueditor.id, cls: (ueditor.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, layout: layout ? layout.getBoundingClientRect() : null, editor: editor ? editor.getBoundingClientRect() : null }; return JSON.stringify(info);
steps.descript: 诊断编辑页布局（打印 URL/viewport/ProseMirror/title/ueditor 等元素位置，排查 Worker 浏览器布局差异）

steps.value:
const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const titleTa = document.querySelector('#title'); const TITLE = ARG || ''; const result = { titlePm: !!titlePm, titleTa: !!titleTa, titleLen: TITLE.length }; if (titlePm) { titlePm.focus(); const r = titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.titlePmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.titlePmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; titlePm.innerHTML = '

' + TITLE + '

'; titlePm.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); titlePm.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); result.titleFilled = true; } if (titleTa) { titleTa.value = TITLE; titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); result.titleTaFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 填写文章标题（evaluate_edit 直接 DOM API 填入，绕过 Playwright 可见性检查）
输入作者

steps.value: const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace'); const CONTENT = ARG || ''; const result = { bodyPm: !!bodyPm, ueditor: !!ueditor, contentLen: CONTENT.length }; if (bodyPm) { bodyPm.focus(); const r = bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.bodyPmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.bodyPmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; bodyPm.innerHTML = CONTENT; bodyPm.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); bodyPm.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); result.bodyFilled = true; } else if (ueditor) { ueditor.innerHTML = CONTENT; ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); result.ueditorFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 输入正文（evaluate_edit 直接 DOM API 填入，绕过 ProseMirror 可见性检查）
等待正文图片渲染完成（用于从正文选封面）

steps.value: const coverBtn = document.querySelector('.select-cover__btn, .js_cover_btn_area, .select-cover__mask'); if (!coverBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到封面选择器' }); coverBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { coverBtn.click(); r(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: true, rect: coverBtn.getBoundingClientRect() })); }, 500));
steps.descript: 点击封面选择器（拖拽或选择封面区域）
等待选图弹窗/菜单弹出

steps.value: const allEls = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div, span, a, li, button, p, [role="menuitem"], [role="option"]')); const items = allEls.filter(el => { const t = (el.textContent||'').trim(); if (t.length === 0 || t.length > 30) return false; const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width === 0 || r.height === 0) return false; return t.includes('从正文') || t.includes('选择正文') || t.includes('正文选择') || t.includes('从文章') || t.includes('文章中选择'); }); if (items.length === 0) { const texts = allEls.map(e=>({text:(e.textContent||'').trim(), visible: e.getBoundingClientRect().width > 0})).filter(x=>x.text.length>0 && x.text.length<30 && x.visible).slice(0, 30); return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到从正文选择菜单项', texts }); } let best = items[0]; try { best.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); } catch(e) {} best.click(); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: (best.textContent||'').trim().slice(0, 50), itemCount: items.length });
steps.descript: 点击'从正文选择'菜单项（弹出正文图片选择弹窗）
等待正文图片选择弹窗加载

steps.value: const diag = { bodyImgs: [], dialogImgs: [], dialogVisible: false }; document.querySelectorAll('.view.rich_media_content img, .ProseMirror img').forEach(img => { const r = img.getBoundingClientRect(); diag.bodyImgs.push({ src: (img.src||'').slice(0, 80), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), visible: r.width > 0 }); }); const dialogs = document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog, .weui-desktop-modal, [role="dialog"], .js_imagedialog, .dialog_wrp, .pop-opr'); diag.dialogVisible = Array.from(dialogs).some(d => d.getBoundingClientRect().width > 0); const dialogImgs = document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog img, .weui-desktop-modal img, [role="dialog"] img, .js_imagedialog img, .pop-opr img, .dialog_wrp img, .img_pick img, .js_img_pick img'); dialogImgs.forEach(img => { const r = img.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 0) diag.dialogImgs.push({ src: (img.src||'').slice(0, 80), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }); }); return JSON.stringify(diag);
steps.descript: 诊断正文图片和弹窗图片（打印正文图片数量、弹窗图片数量、弹窗是否可见）

steps.value: const findDialogImgs = () => { const dialogs = document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog, .weui-desktop-modal, [role="dialog"], .js_imagedialog, .pop-opr, .dialog_wrp, .img_pick, .js_img_pick'); const imgs = []; for (const d of dialogs) { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width === 0 || r.height === 0) continue; d.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(img => { const ir = img.getBoundingClientRect(); if (ir.width > 20 && ir.height > 20) { imgs.push({ el: img, src: img.src, w: ir.width, h: ir.height }); } }); } return imgs; }; let imgs = findDialogImgs(); let retry = 0; while (imgs.length === 0 && retry < 6) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); imgs = findDialogImgs(); retry++; } if (imgs.length === 0) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '弹窗内未找到可选图片（已重试 ' + retry + ' 次）' }); const target = imgs[0].el; target.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { target.click(); r(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: true, imgSrc: imgs[0].src.slice(0, 80), imgSize: { w: imgs[0].w, h: imgs[0].h }, totalImgs: imgs.length, retries: retry })); }, 500));
steps.descript: 点击弹窗内第一张正文图片（作为封面）
等待图片选中

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, .weui-desktop-btn, a.weui-desktop-btn, span.weui-desktop-btn')); const confirmBtn = btns.find(b => { const t = (b.textContent||'').trim(); const r = b.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width === 0 || r.height === 0) return false; return t === '完成' || t === '确定' || t === '确认' || t === '下一步' || t === '下一步' || t.includes('完成'); }); if (!confirmBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到完成按钮', buttonTexts: btns.filter(b => b.getBoundingClientRect().width > 0).map(b => (b.textContent||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) }); confirmBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); confirmBtn.click(); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: (confirmBtn.textContent||'').trim() });
steps.descript: 点击'完成'按钮确认选择封面
等待封面设置完成

steps.value: const coverImg = document.querySelector('.select-cover__mask img, .appmsg_cover_area img, .cover_img, .select-cover img, .select-cover__btn img'); const errorMsg = document.querySelector('.js_cover_error, .js_error_msg'); return JSON.stringify({ coverSet: !!coverImg, coverImgSrc: coverImg ? coverImg.src.slice(0, 80) : null, errorMsg: errorMsg ? (errorMsg.innerText||'').trim() : null });
steps.descript: 验证封面是否设置成功

branch_steps.selector: //div[text()="声明原创成功后将获得平台著作权保护，并有可能得到推荐"]

steps.descript: 声明原创分支

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, .weui-desktop-btn, a.weui-desktop-btn, span.weui-desktop-btn')); const publishBtn = btns.find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '发表' || t === '无需声明并发表' || t === '群发'; }); if (!publishBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到发表按钮', buttonTexts: btns.map(b => (b.innerText||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) }); publishBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { publishBtn.click(); r(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: (publishBtn.innerText||'').trim(), rect: publishBtn.getBoundingClientRect() })); }, 500));
steps.descript: 点击发表（evaluate_edit: scrollIntoView + click，解决按钮在视口外 Playwright click 失效问题）
等待发表完成

steps.value: const url = window.location.href; const stillOnEditPage = url.includes('appmsg_edit_v2'); const errorEls = document.querySelectorAll('.js_error_msg, .weui-desktop-toast--warn, .frm_msg.fail, .js_cover_error, .weui-desktop-toast--error, .weui-desktop-toast__content'); const errors = Array.from(errorEls).map(e => (e.innerText || e.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3); if (stillOnEditPage) { throw new Error('发表后 URL 仍为编辑页（appmsg_edit_v2），发表动作未触发。可能原因：封面图未设置/表单验证失败。错误提示: ' + (errors.join('; ') || '无')); } return url;
steps.descript: 验证发表成功（URL 必须跳转离开编辑页，否则抛错；检测 .js_error_msg/.weui-desktop-toast--warn/.js_cover_error 等错误提示）
